texto: In fact take my body who will, take it I say, it is not me. And therefore three cheers for Nantucket; and come a stove boat and stove body when they will, for stave my soul, Jove himself cannot.
explicacao: Citação de Melville Herman sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “In fact take my body who will, take it I say, it is not me. And therefore three cheers for Nantuc…” articula reflexao, soul, stove em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
